# ALLONE — All Systems. One Intelligence.
> Comprehensive information about ALLONE, an AI automation agency.

## Company Overview
ALLONE is an AI automation agency headquartered in Tbilisi, Georgia with a European office in Brussels, Belgium. Founded in late 2025, ALLONE specializes in delivering AI-powered solutions that transform how businesses operate.

### Mission
To converge all business systems into one intelligent layer, making enterprise-grade AI accessible to companies of all sizes.

### Competitive Advantage
Our AI-powered delivery stack drops implementation costs by approximately 90% compared to traditional agencies. We combine cutting-edge AI models with human expertise to deliver solutions at unprecedented speed and quality.

## Detailed Service Offerings

### 1. AI Chatbots
Build intelligent conversational interfaces that understand context, handle complex queries, and integrate seamlessly with existing business tools.
- Natural language understanding with multi-turn conversations
- Multi-language support (English, Georgian, and more)
- Integration with CRM, helpdesk, and e-commerce platforms
- Analytics dashboard for conversation insights
- 24/7 automated customer support
- Custom training on business-specific knowledge bases

### 2. Custom AI Solutions
Purpose-built AI systems designed for specific business challenges.
- Machine learning model development and deployment
- Computer vision for quality control, document processing, OCR
- Natural language processing pipelines
- AI agents for autonomous task execution
- Predictive analytics and forecasting
- Recommendation engines

### 3. Workflow Automation
End-to-end process automation that eliminates manual work and reduces errors.
- Document processing and data extraction
- Automated decision-making workflows
- Integration with existing CRMs, ERPs, and internal tools
- Email and communication automation
- Invoice processing and financial workflows
- Custom API integrations

### 4. Website Development
Modern, high-performance websites built with the latest technology stack.
- Next.js and React-based architecture
- AI-powered features (chatbots, search, personalization)
- SEO optimization and Core Web Vitals performance
- E-commerce capabilities
- Multi-language support
- Analytics and conversion tracking

### 5. Strategy & Consulting
Expert guidance for businesses at any stage of AI adoption.
- AI readiness assessment
- Implementation roadmaps
- Technology stack evaluation
- ROI analysis and business case development
- Ongoing optimization and support
- Team training and knowledge transfer

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **AI/ML**: Custom models, LLM integration, RAG systems
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, Supabase, PostgreSQL
- **Cloud**: Vercel, Cloudflare, AWS
- **Automation**: n8n, custom workflow engines

## Portfolio Projects

### Equivalenza Georgia
E-commerce platform for the international perfume brand's Georgian market. Full digital storefront with inventory management, payment processing, and customer analytics.

### DataRooms
AI-powered virtual data rooms for investors and M&A transactions. Secure document management with intelligent search, automated NDA tracking, and access analytics.

### FIFTY
Digital platform for a community-owned innovation space. Member management, event booking, and community engagement tools.

### HostWise
Property management SaaS platform with intelligent automation. Automated guest communication, dynamic pricing, and operations management for short-term rentals.

### KaoTenders
B2B industrial tender platform with AI-powered matching. Connects suppliers with procurement opportunities using intelligent categorization and matching algorithms.

### Chaos Concept
Fashion and art concept store digital platform. E-commerce, editorial content, and brand storytelling combined in a premium digital experience.

### INNRBURIAL
Publishing and art platform for contemporary Georgian literature and visual art. Digital publishing, e-commerce, and community features.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://allone.ge
- **Email**: hello@allone.ge
- **Primary Office**: Tbilisi, Georgia
- **European Office**: Brussels, Belgium

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What industries does ALLONE serve?**
A: We work across industries including e-commerce, real estate, finance, manufacturing, fashion, publishing, and hospitality. Our AI solutions are adaptable to any business domain.

**Q: How long does a typical project take?**
A: Simple chatbot implementations can be live in 1-2 weeks. Custom AI solutions typically take 4-8 weeks. Full platform builds range from 6-12 weeks depending on complexity.

**Q: Do you work with international clients?**
A: Yes. While based in Georgia and Belgium, we serve clients globally. Our team operates in English, Georgian, and can support other languages.

**Q: What makes ALLONE different from other AI agencies?**
A: Our AI-native delivery approach means we use AI throughout our own workflow, reducing costs by ~90% while maintaining quality. This efficiency is passed on to clients through competitive pricing and faster delivery.
